FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 700-739 4.17% 8.55% 9.02% 4.71% 12.43% 740-779 5.6% 12.67% 4.3% 4.57% 5.72% 780+ 7.34% 5.96% 12.9% 6.64% 10.87% Stip cleared — UW
